// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.other;

import static com.consumer.x.InternalLog.*;

// Adversarial (fail closed): a wildcard static import cannot prove source-only
// that the unqualified logInternal comes from InternalLog, so no origin is
// established and the catch swallows. The recognition must not over-reach here.
class Tier2StaticWildcard {
    void wildcardStaticIsNotEnough() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            logInternal("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
